creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

thank you for your submission.  But I am afraid we cannot add your site
to the consultant list at the moment:

- I checked your website.  All it talks about is "Webdesign".  No
mentioning of consulting/support at all.  Or even Unix/FreeBSD.
- The website is still work-in-progress.  No changes in 6 months.

So we will need some more information/an update to website before we can
continue here.

Regards.


jkois

-- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
